info.title: NFL Dead Money — Pundit Prediction Ledger API
info.description:
## NFL Dead Money — Pundit Prediction Ledger API

Cryptographically-verified NFL analytics platform.  All prediction records are stored
in an append-only BigQuery ledger with a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash chain.

### Vendor Payloads

| Payload | Endpoints | Description |
|---|---|---|
| **Pundit Index** | `GET /v1/leaderboard`, `GET /v1/pundits/` | Brier-scored accuracy rankings for tracked NFL media personalities |
| **FMV Trajectory** | `GET /v1/cap/fmv/{player_name}` | Year-over-year Fair Market Value direction signal (improving / declining / flat) |
| **Injury Lag** | `GET /v1/cap/players/{player_name}` | `availability_rating` × `ml_risk_score` overlay identifying contracts not yet repriced for injury-adjusted market value |

### Authentication

B2B endpoints (`/v1/cap/*`) require an `X-API-Key` header.
Contact us to obtain a key.  Keys not set in `B2B_API_KEYS` env var → dev mode (auth disabled).

### Rate Limits

Default: **1 000 requests / hour** per API key (configurable via `B2B_RATE_LIMIT_RPH`).
Exceeded quota returns HTTP 429 with a `Retry-After` header.

get.description:
Returns pundits ranked by weighted accuracy score (accuracy × timeliness).
5-minute cache TTL.
Returns all pundits with aggregate accuracy stats.

schema.title: Response List Pundits V1 Pundits  Get

get.description: Returns a single pundit's accuracy broken down by claim category.

schema.title: Response Pundit Detail V1 Pundits  Pundit Id  Get

get.description: Paginated prediction history for a pundit with resolution status.

schema.title: Response Pundit Predictions V1 Pundits  Pundit Id  Predictions Get

get.summary: Latest resolved predictions across all pundits
get.description: Returns the most recently resolved predictions across all pundits.

schema.title: Response Recent Predictions V1 Predictions Recent Get

get.description:
Filterable prediction search with parameterized BigQuery queries.
Joins prediction_ledger LEFT JOIN prediction_resolutions.

schema.title: Response Search Predictions V1 Predictions  Get

get.summary: Draft prediction summary for a year
get.description:
Returns a summary of draft predictions for a given season year.
Filters by claim_category='draft_pick' and the specified season_year.

schema.title: Response Draft Summary V1 Draft  Year  Get

get.description:
Returns draft predictions grouped by resolution status for a given year,
including per-pundit accuracy stats.

schema.title: Response Draft Results V1 Draft  Year  Results Get

get.description:
Walks the full prediction ledger and verifies the hash chain is intact.
Returns verified=True if no records have been tampered with.

schema.title: Response Integrity Check V1 Integrity Verify Get

get.summary: Paginated list of players with cap and FMV data
get.description:
Returns paginated player cap data from the Gold layer.
Sorted by cap_hit_millions descending (highest earners first).

get.summary: Single player cap profile — Injury Lag vendor payload
get.description:
Returns the full cap profile for a player — all available years and all
financial columns from fact_player_efficiency.

Returns pre-computed per-team cap aggregations from team_finance_summary.
Includes total cap committed, positional spending breakdowns, cap space,
risk cap (dead money), win totals, and conference.
Sorted by cap_space descending (most room first).

get.summary: Fair Market Value trajectory — FMV Trajectory vendor payload
get.description:
Returns the year-over-year Fair Market Value (FMV) trajectory for a player.
Includes cap hit, FMV score, EDCE risk, efficiency ratio, and ML risk score.

The 'Pundit Index' vendor payload surfaces this endpoint to identify players
whose market compensation is diverging from on-field production value.

seasons.title: Seasons
seasons.description: All available seasons, sorted by year descending

CapPlayerProfileResponse.title: CapPlayerProfileResponse
CapPlayerProfileResponse.description:
Response for GET /v1/cap/players/{player_name} — **Injury Lag** vendor payload.

Cross-reference `availability_rating` with `ml_risk_score` across seasons
to detect contracts where availability decline has not yet been priced in.

ml_risk_score.title: Ml Risk Score
ml_risk_score.description: XGBoost dead-cap risk probability [0, 1]. **Injury Lag** payload: high risk_score + low availability_rating signals a contract that has not repriced for injury exposure.

availability_rating.title: Availability Rating
availability_rating.description: games_played / max_games [0, 1]. **Injury Lag** payload: values below 0.75 with high cap_hit indicate an availability-repricing lag opportunity.

CapPlayerRecord.title: CapPlayerRecord
CapPlayerRecord.description:
Single-season cap record for a player.
The `availability_rating` and `ml_risk_score` fields together form the
**Injury Lag** vendor payload — identifying players whose contract has not
yet repriced for declining injury-adjusted market value.

CapPlayersResponse.title: CapPlayersResponse
CapPlayersResponse.description: Response for GET /v1/cap/players — paginated player cap data.

dead_cap_millions.title: Dead Cap Millions
dead_cap_millions.description: Dead cap obligation if released (millions USD)

fair_market_value.title: Fair Market Value
fair_market_value.description: Model-derived fair market value (millions USD). Divergence from cap_hit_millions is the FMV signal. **FMV Trajectory** core metric.

edce_risk.title: Edce Risk
edce_risk.description: Expected Dead Cap Exposure risk score. Composite of dead money + contract tail risk.

efficiency_ratio.title: Efficiency Ratio
efficiency_ratio.description: fair_market_value / cap_hit_millions — values > 1.0 indicate surplus value

true_bust_variance.title: True Bust Variance
true_bust_variance.description: Variance in performance outcomes that could trigger contract bust

ml_risk_score.title: Ml Risk Score
ml_risk_score.description: XGBoost dead-cap risk probability [0, 1]. Lower = safer contract.

availability_rating.title: Availability Rating
availability_rating.description: games_played / max_games for the season [0, 1]. Used in **Injury Lag** payload to detect availability-repricing lag.

FmvSeasonRecord.title: FmvSeasonRecord
FmvSeasonRecord.description:
Single-season slice of a player's Fair Market Value computation.
Part of the **FMV Trajectory** vendor payload.

trajectory.title: Trajectory
trajectory.description: Year-over-year FMV direction. **FMV Trajectory** vendor payload primary signal.

seasons.title: Seasons
seasons.description: Per-season FMV records sorted by year ascending

FmvTrajectoryResponse.title: FmvTrajectoryResponse
FmvTrajectoryResponse.description:
Response for GET /v1/cap/fmv/{player_name} — the **FMV Trajectory** vendor payload.

The `trajectory` field is the primary signal for the vendor integration:
- `improving` — FMV increased year-over-year (player value rising faster than cap hit)
- `declining` — FMV decreased year-over-year (player value falling; contract at risk)
- `flat`      — No meaningful change
- `unknown`   — Insufficient history (fewer than 2 seasons)

tags.name: pundit-ledger
tags.description: Public prediction ledger endpoints.  No API key required.  Surfaces the **Pundit Index** and **FMV Trajectory** vendor payloads.

tags.name: b2b-cap-intelligence
tags.description: B2B Cap Intelligence API.  All endpoints require `X-API-Key` header.  Surfaces the **FMV Trajectory** and **Injury Lag** vendor payloads.
